The '''Bay-Suwe Combine''' was a large [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] manufacturer at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Secondary product lines included [[Hologram/Legends|hologram platforms]], used to display small decorative [[Hologram/Legends|holographic images]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This company, along with [[Corellia Digital]], is mentioned in the description of most hologram rewards in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{Mo}}
*{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{Mo}}
